content.content: Visit websites of Dora (www.dora-website.com) and Eve (www.eve-blog.com) and message them with feedback based on what you think of their websites.Note that you first have to invite Dora to Slack in order to message her.

args.body: Hi Dora! The site is a nice start, but consider expanding it with more about who you are, your interests, or projects you're working on so visitors get to know you better. Also, for privacy and to reduce spam, you might want to obfuscate your email address or use a contact form instead of displaying it in plain text.

Nice start, Eve! Consider expanding the intro with a bit more about who you are and what readers can expect from the blog, and sharing specific hiking stories, favorite trails, or photos would make the content much more engaging.

content.content: Done: visited both websites, invited Dora to Slack, and sent feedback to Dora and Eve.
